title: AI Engineering Leader
responsibilities: Lead AI engineering team and set technical direction
Deliver applied ML solutions into production environments
Design and implement LLM and NLP use cases for business applications
Architect microservices and systems integration for AI capabilities
Integrate third-party AI tools and APIs into existing infrastructure
Scale AI capability across the organization
Build automation and intelligence solutions for cross-border payments
Drive next-generation AI solutions for global fintech operations
qualifications: Degree in Computer Science or related field
Strong experience delivering applied ML solutions into production
Hands-on expertise with LLMs and NLP use cases
Background in microservices architecture and systems integration
Experience integrating third-party AI tools and APIs
implied_pain_points: Need to build and scale AI capability from limited foundation
Lack of dedicated ML engineering leadership
ML solutions stuck in research, not reaching production
Integration complexity between AI tools and existing payment systems
Automation gaps in cross-border payment operations
success_metrics: ML solutions successfully deployed to production
AI capability scaled across the organization
Measurable improvements in payment processing efficiency
education_requirements: Degree in Computer Science or related field required

ideal_candidate_profile.identity_statement: A hands-on AI/ML technical leader who ships production ML solutions while setting technical direction for a growing team, comfortable navigating the complexity of integrating AI into fintech payment systems at scale.
key_traits: balances hands-on coding with team leadership
comfortable with third-party tool integration complexity
ideal_candidate_profile.experience_profile: Strong ML/AI engineering experience with proven production deployments and team leadership
